hero.tagline: A portal for Hostopia product, sales, and training content – all in one place.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search for a product, asset, or use case

browse.title: Let Us Help You Find What You're Looking For
browse.subtitle: Use this guided experience to quickly surface the right resources in four simple steps.
browse.step1Desc: Choose where your customer is in their journey
browse.step4Desc: Define the task you're working on
browse.viewResultsDesc: See all matching assets, review them online, download them, or refine your filters to narrow the results.
browse.step1Copy: Start from where your customer is in their lifecycle. Explore assets designed to support awareness, evaluation, purchase, and growth.
browse.step2Copy: Explore materials organized by product to quickly access the resources tied to specific solutions.
browse.step3Copy: Quickly jump to the format you need—presentations, documents, videos, or campaign kits.
browse.step4Copy: Find assets based on the task you're trying to complete, from launching campaigns to supporting sales conversations.
browse.noneDescStage: Skip this filter; show assets from any stage.
browse.noneDescProduct: Skip this filter; show assets for any product.
browse.noneDescContent: Skip this filter; show any content format.
browse.noneDescWorkflow: Skip this filter; show assets for any workflow.
browse.tapToSelect: Tap to select. Then click Next.
browse.viewYourResultsDesc: See all matching assets, review them online, download them, or refine your filters to narrow the results.
browse.noAssetsMatch: No assets match. Try fewer or different filters.
browse.clickAssetToView: Click an asset above to view its details here.

ticker.label: The 2026 Hostopia Product Guide is now available in Connects.

footer.copyright: © {year} Hostopia. Hostopia Connects – internal enablement prototype.

cart.title: My Resources
cart.reviewIntro: This is your briefcase for decks, documents, and videos. When you submit the form on the right, you'll receive a single email with secure, time-limited download links for everything in My Resources.
cart.downloadsEmail: Downloads are delivered via email so you can easily access your selected resources anytime.
cart.emptyHint: Browse journeys and products first, then use the
cart.emptyHintSuffix: button on any asset detail page to see items here.
cart.requestBundleIntro: We only ask for what we need to send your download links and understand which companies are engaging with Hostopia Connects.
cart.optInLabel: Subscribe to our marketing updates and product news.
cart.submitHint: Add at least one asset to My Resources before requesting your download links.
cart.successTitle: Your resources are on the way
cart.successBody: Check your inbox for an email containing secure links to download the assets you selected.
cart.requestReceived: Request received. In the full implementation, this would send a single email with secure links to all selected assets.

howItWorks.title: How Hostopia Connects Works
howItWorks.metaDescription: Your assets are saved in your briefcase (My Resources). When you're ready, submit your contact details and we'll email you download links for all your selected assets.
howItWorks.headline: Your assets are added to your briefcase—My Resources.
howItWorks.intro: When you're ready, provide your contact details and request an email to receive download links for all your selected assets.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore by product journey, content type, or use case. Preview documents when available before adding to My Resources.
howItWorks.step2Desc: On any asset detail page, add the items you want. Review your selection on the My Resources page.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Submit your name, company, and email once. We'll email you secure, time-limited download links for all your selected assets.
howItWorks.leadCaptureBody: We capture just three fields – Full Name, Company, and Email – plus an optional marketing opt-in. Your data is used to send the download links and may be synced to our CRM for follow-up.

featured.title: Featured & What's New
featured.description: Latest and featured assets on Hostopia Connects.
featured.subtitle: The latest and most relevant product, sales, and marketing content. Sorted by most recently updated.

asset.goBackHome: Go back to Hostopia Connects home.
asset.previewHint: Use Preview to open the file in a new tab before adding to My Resources. Your thumbs up/down helps us improve materials.

productList.goBackHome: Go back to Hostopia Connects home.
productList.filteredIntro: Assets below are filtered to this product. From here, reps can open individual assets or add them to My Resources (coming next).
productList.noAssets: We don't have any sample assets wired up for this product yet.

journeyList.notFound: We couldn't find that product journey.
journeyList.goBackHome: Go back to Hostopia Connects home.
journeyList.journeyBuildABrand: Domains, logo design, and business email assets to help customers look credible from day one.
journeyList.journeyGetOnline: SSL, hosting, and website solutions – everything you need to put small businesses on the map.
journeyList.journeyGetFound: Directories, SEO, and reputation management content to drive visibility and reviews.
journeyList.journeyGrowTheirBusiness: Ecommerce, custom sites, and Online Fax to deepen relationships and unlock new revenue.
journeyList.chooseProduct: Choose a product under this journey to see its enablement assets.
journeyList.noProducts: We don't have any products wired up for this journey yet.

highlights.popularDesc: Most viewed assets in the last period.
